evidence.note: The FLAT_ALL fallback policy backing BASELINE_V1_CONTROL applies no filter predicate at all.
BASELINE_V1_CONTROL is registered as an alias of the FLAT_ALL fallback policy.
Flat $10 stake is used for PnL computation across fallback policies including BASELINE_V1_CONTROL.
fetchAllResolvedRows sources from the live resolved corpus (generated_signal_pairs) via Supabase RPC.

readWriteSafety.notes: Only writes report artifacts (CSV/ExcelJS workbook) via the surrounding report script; the BASELINE_V1_CONTROL filter/policy itself has no DB write path.

knownRisks: This declaration documents the FLAT_ALL/BASELINE_V1_CONTROL predicate found in scripts/morning-model-report.ts only; it does not certify that this file or any other implementation is a runner-safe module.
